parameters.name: BRAM_bitsize_max
parameters.description: Maximum BRAM size (in bits) supported by the target device.

parameters.name: BRAM_bitsize_min
parameters.description: Minimum BRAM size (in bits) supported by the target device.

parameters.name: CSE_size
parameters.description: Minimum bitwidth (in bits) for common subexpression elimination; smaller expressions are skipped unless they are extract_bit or lut expressions.

parameters.name: ConnectionOffset
parameters.description: Absolute connection delay added to timing estimates (in time units).

parameters.name: DSPs_rx_sizes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DSP pre-adder/register X sizes supported by the device.

parameters.name: DSPs_ry_sizes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DSP pre-adder/register Y sizes supported by the device.

parameters.name: DSPs_x_sizes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DSP operand X sizes supported by the device.

parameters.name: DSPs_y_sizes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DSP operand Y sizes supported by the device.

parameters.name: DebugDFM
parameters.description: Enable extra design-flow-manager consistency checks and debug dot dumps (debug builds).

parameters.name: FanOutCoefficient
parameters.description: Coefficient used in fanout delay estimation during allocation.

parameters.name: LP-BB-list
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of basic-block IDs whose loops are eligible for loop pipelining.

parameters.name: OutputCarryConnectionRatio
parameters.description: Relative carry-output connection delay as a fraction of setup/hold time.

parameters.name: OutputDSPConnectionRatio
parameters.description: Relative DSP-output connection delay as a fraction of setup/hold time.

parameters.name: QUEUESIZE_DEPTH
parameters.description: Override depth for dataflow FIFO interfaces (<=0 means use interface/default depth).

parameters.name: RelativeConnectionOffset
parameters.description: Connection delay offset relative to setup/hold time.

parameters.name: StatesNumberNormalization
parameters.description: Normalization divisor for the FSM state count when estimating controller delay; used when an explicit state count is available.

parameters.name: ToDSPRegisterDelay
parameters.description: Base delay (in setup/hold time units) for paths to DSP registers.

parameters.name: USE_TIME_UNIT_PS
parameters.description: Device timing reports are in picoseconds (1) instead of nanoseconds (0).

parameters.name: axi_burst_type
parameters.description: AXI burst type required by the device; used to configure AXI adapters.

parameters.name: bitvalue
parameters.description: Enable Bit-Value analysis pass.

parameters.name: bitvalue-opt
parameters.description: Enable Bit-Value optimization pass.

parameters.name: bus-no-chain
parameters.description: Disable chaining of operations that access memory through a bus.

parameters.name: chained-memory-modules
parameters.description: Use chained memory modules instead of parallel chaining for memory ports.

parameters.name: connection_offset
parameters.description: Device connection offset used in timing models (device XML parameter).

parameters.name: constdiv_composite_enable
parameters.description: Enable composite lowering for non-power-of-two const div/mod by factoring the divisor into pairs when profitable.

parameters.name: constdiv_composite_margin
parameters.description: Extra margin added when comparing composite vs atomic const-div cost; higher values make composite less likely.

parameters.name: constdiv_composite_max_pairs
parameters.description: Maximum number of divisor factor pairs to evaluate for composite const-div lowering.

parameters.name: constdiv_dsp_scale_k
parameters.description: Scale factor applied only to the DSP term (not LUT term) when converting mulhi area to LUT-equivalents in the const-div cost model.

parameters.name: constdiv_lowering_mode
parameters.description: Select const div/mod lowering: llvm_magic, linarch, btcd, or auto (cost-driven).

parameters.name: constmul_balance_tree
parameters.description: Emit balanced add-tree for constant-multiply shift/add terms to reduce dependency depth.

parameters.name: constmul_balance_tree_min_terms
parameters.description: Minimum number of terms before enabling balanced-tree emission for constant multiply.

parameters.name: constmul_dsp_scale_k
parameters.description: Scale factor applied only to the DSP term (not LUT term) when converting multiplier area to LUT-equivalents in constant-multiply profitability checks.

parameters.name: constmul_enable
parameters.description: Enable constant-multiply expansion into shift/add sequences when profitable.

parameters.name: constmul_enable_small_factor_chains
parameters.description: Enable small-factor addition chains (e.g., 3/5/9) in constant-multiply decomposition.

parameters.name: constmul_kcm_alpha
parameters.description: KCM LUT input size (alpha); initialized from max_lut_size and clamped to max_lut_size if user-provided.

parameters.name: constmul_kcm_cost_model
parameters.description: KCM cost estimator used in IR lowering: heuristic (closed-form) or mockturtle (logic-mapped).

parameters.name: constmul_kcm_enable
parameters.description: Enable KCM-based constant-multiply lowering (LUT + add).

parameters.name: constmul_kcm_merge_table_add
parameters.description: Use Walters/Wirthlin merge (alpha-1 inputs) for table+add in a rake structure.

parameters.name: constmul_kcm_sum_strategy
parameters.description: KCM partial-sum strategy: tree (balanced) or rake (chain).

parameters.name: constmul_max_depth
parameters.description: Maximum adder depth allowed for constant-multiply expansion.

parameters.name: constmul_max_terms
parameters.description: Maximum number of shift/add terms allowed for constant-multiply expansion.

parameters.name: constmul_try_factor_forms
parameters.description: Try factor forms (q * (2^m +/- 1)) when building constant-multiply decompositions.

parameters.name: constmultdiv_decision_metric
parameters.description: Decision policy for const mult/div alternative selection: auto (objective-driven), score, proxy, or hybrid (score primary with proxy tie-break).

parameters.name: constmultdiv_lut_cost_model
parameters.description: LUT cost estimator for const-div table architectures (linarch/btcd): auto (analytic when in_bits <= max_lut_size, otherwise mockturtle), analytic, mockturtle (per-stage), or mockturtle_full (full-network mapping, more accurate and slower).

parameters.name: constmultdiv_score
parameters.description: Cost score mode for const mult/div: area, delay, atp, or weighted.

parameters.name: constmultdiv_w_area
parameters.description: Area weight for the weighted const mult/div score.

parameters.name: constmultdiv_w_latency
parameters.description: Latency weight for the weighted const mult/div score.

parameters.name: correct-transformation
parameters.description: Expected count of correct transformations for find-max-transformations tests.

parameters.name: dfm_statistics
parameters.description: Collect design flow manager statistics (time, passes, changes).

parameters.name: disable-THR
parameters.description: Disable THR cost table construction during tree-manager creation.

parameters.name: disable-cse
parameters.description: Disable common subexpression elimination pass.

parameters.name: disable-dce
parameters.description: Disable dead code elimination pass.

parameters.name: disable-extract-patterns
parameters.description: Disable pattern extraction pass.

parameters.name: disable-fanout_opt
parameters.description: Disable fanout optimization pass.

parameters.name: disable-invalidations
parameters.description: Disable design-flow invalidation relationships (no re-execution of invalidated steps).

parameters.name: disable_extract_ternary_patterns
parameters.description: Disable ternary pattern extraction based on device settings.

parameters.name: enable-FSMX
parameters.description: Enable FSM-X propagation for write-enable signals in controller generation.

parameters.name: enable-conservative-sdc
parameters.description: Enable conservative simple-code-motion behavior when using SDC scheduling.

parameters.name: family
parameters.description: Target device family name from device XML.

parameters.name: fast-backend
parameters.description: Enable fast backend flow mode in synthesis scripts.

parameters.name: function-opt
parameters.description: Enable function call optimization/inlining pass.

parameters.name: is_single_write_memory
parameters.description: Device memories allow only a single write per cycle.

parameters.name: load-store-no-chain
parameters.description: Disable chaining when load/store operations are involved.

parameters.name: max_lut_size
parameters.description: Maximum LUT input size for LUT-based transformations and cost models.

parameters.name: memory_correction_coefficient
parameters.description: Scaling factor applied to memory timing corrections in allocation.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Target device model name from device XML.

parameters.name: multi-proc-fsm
parameters.description: Generate FSM output/transition logic as multiple processes in HDL.

parameters.name: no-local-mem
parameters.description: Disable allocation of local memories.

parameters.name: no-private-mem
parameters.description: Disable allocation of private memories.

parameters.name: no-share-max
parameters.description: Prevent sharing of max/min functional units by forcing zero resource area.

parameters.name: none-ptrdefault
parameters.description: Treat ptrdefault interface as none for I/O pointers.

parameters.name: none-registered-ptrdefault
parameters.description: Treat ptrdefault interface as none and drop interface registers for I/O pointers.

parameters.name: opaque-pointers
parameters.description: Enable opaque pointers for clang 16+; when disabled, passes -no-opaque-pointers.

parameters.name: package
parameters.description: Target device package from device XML.

parameters.name: print-dot-FF
parameters.description: Enable dot graph emission for frontend flow steps when debug output is active.

parameters.name: print-ir-manager
parameters.description: Dump IR manager IR (raw and bambu-LLVM) before/after frontend steps.

parameters.name: profile_steps
parameters.description: Collect per-step profiling statistics in the design flow manager.

parameters.name: ra-disjoint-interval-max
parameters.description: Maximum number of disjoint intervals kept per edge predicate; exceeding this threshold degrades to unknown.

parameters.name: registered_noc
parameters.description: Use a registered NoC interface in bus generation.

parameters.name: sds_memory_mode
parameters.description: Select the private synchronous SDS BRAM wrapper: SDS keeps split read/write ports, SDS1 uses a single address/size/predicate interface.

parameters.name: simple-benchmark-name
parameters.description: Use a simplified benchmark name without auto-appending top function suffixes.

parameters.name: small_normalized_resource_area
parameters.description: Threshold for treating a resource as small in CDFC module binding.

parameters.name: speed_grade
parameters.description: Target device speed grade from device XML.

parameters.name: use_soft_64_mul
parameters.description: Prefer software 64-bit multiplication instead of DSP-based implementation.

parameters.name: variable-mem-lat
parameters.description: Enable variable-memory-latency checks when allocating RAMs.

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.description: Target device vendor from device XML.

parameters.name: wrong-transformation
parameters.description: Expected count of wrong transformations for find-max-transformations tests.
